name: Y-12
description_short: Y-12 Federal Credit Union is an NCUA-insured credit union serving members in Oak Ridge, Tennessee with consumer loans, mortgages, and deposit accounts.
description_long:
Y-12 Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution regulated by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA). The organization operates a headquarters branch in Oak Ridge, Tennessee at 501 Lafayette Drive, and recently welcomed former FSB (Federal Savings Bank) members into its membership base. As a federal credit union, Y-12 provides traditional financial services typical of cooperative credit unions, including deposit accounts, consumer lending, and mortgage products.

The credit union offers a comprehensive suite of financial services accessible through multiple channels. Members can access digital banking platforms, apply for personal loans and mortgages, manage student loans, and utilize in-person banking services at their Oak Ridge location. The branch provides full-service teller operations, drive-thru banking, ATM access, safe deposit boxes, and additional convenience services such as coin counting machines and after-hours deposit capabilities. Online loan application tools are available, with members able to review pre-approved loan offers through their digital banking portal or mobile app.

Y-12 distinguishes itself through flexible access options, including extended drive-thru hours (8 a.m. - 6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m. - 2 p.m. Saturdays) and Saturday lobby hours. The institution maintains a published routing number (264281432) and actively recruits staff, suggesting organizational stability and growth. The welcoming of FSB members indicates the credit union's expansion strategy and commitment to serving an existing customer base transitioning to credit union membership.

As a credit union, Y-12 operates on a not-for-profit model where member interests theoretically take priority over shareholder returns. However, the website provided limited detailed information regarding specific loan rates, membership eligibility criteria, fee structures, or competitive product terms. Prospective members should contact the credit union directly or visit in person to obtain complete information about membership requirements, current rates, and detailed product offerings.
services: Digital banking platform with online account access
pros: Extended drive-thru hours (8 a.m. - 6 p.m. weekdays) provide convenient access beyond typical banking hours
Multiple in-person services including full-service tellers, drive-thru, ATMs, and safe deposit boxes
Digital banking platform with mobile app access and pre-approved loan offer visibility
Coin counting machine available at the branch for member convenience
After-hours depository service for secure cash deposits outside regular hours
NCUA insurance protection on deposits up to $250,000 standard share account coverage
Not-for-profit credit union structure theoretically prioritizes member benefits over profits
cons: Limited branch footprint with only Oak Ridge headquarters location mentioned; single-location accessibility may inconvenience members outside the immediate area
Website provides minimal information on loan rates, APRs, fees, or specific product terms needed for rate shopping
No information disclosed regarding membership eligibility requirements or enrollment process details
Limited details on student loan services beyond payment processing capability mentioned
Relatively basic website with sparse product comparison tools or detailed service descriptions
best_for: Oak Ridge, Tennessee area residents seeking local credit union banking with extended hours
Former FSB members transitioning to credit union membership as part of institutional consolidation
Consumers preferring not-for-profit financial institutions over for-profit banks
Members seeking integrated consumer loans, mortgages, and deposit accounts from one institution
diagnosis: Y-12 Federal Credit Union is best suited for Oak Ridge-area residents and former FSB members seeking a local, not-for-profit financial institution with extended service hours and integrated lending and deposit products. The primary caveat is that the website lacks detailed product terms, rates, and fees—prospective members must contact the credit union directly at 800-482-1043 or visit in person to evaluate competitive offerings and membership eligibility.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Y-12 — Credit Union in Oak Ridge, TN | CreditDoc
meta_description: Y-12 — NCUA-insured credit union in Oak Ridge, TN. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
